# HELP drone_swarm_controlplane_ready Control-plane readiness state.
# TYPE drone_swarm_controlplane_ready gauge
drone_swarm_controlplane_ready 1
# HELP drone_swarm_online_drones Number of reachable drones.
# TYPE drone_swarm_online_drones gauge
drone_swarm_online_drones 5
# HELP drone_swarm_total_drones Number of known drones.
# TYPE drone_swarm_total_drones gauge
drone_swarm_total_drones 5
# HELP drone_swarm_real_drones Number of real-source drones.
# TYPE drone_swarm_real_drones gauge
drone_swarm_real_drones 0
# HELP drone_swarm_stale_drones Number of stale drones.
# TYPE drone_swarm_stale_drones gauge
drone_swarm_stale_drones 0
# HELP drone_swarm_critical_alerts Number of critical fleet alerts.
# TYPE drone_swarm_critical_alerts gauge
drone_swarm_critical_alerts 0
# HELP drone_swarm_pending_approvals Number of pending approvals.
# TYPE drone_swarm_pending_approvals gauge
drone_swarm_pending_approvals 0
# HELP drone_swarm_event_log_entries Number of security and runtime event entries.
# TYPE drone_swarm_event_log_entries gauge
drone_swarm_event_log_entries 1
# HELP drone_swarm_command_log_entries Number of recorded command entries.
# TYPE drone_swarm_command_log_entries gauge
drone_swarm_command_log_entries 0
